title: Cost Tracking
description: LLM spend tracking: daily spend, by persona, budget utilization

panels.title: Daily Spend (USD)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, SUM(CAST(devloop_cost_spent_usd AS DOUBLE)) as total_spent FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND devloop_cost_spent_usd IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Spend by Persona
panels.query: SELECT persona_name as persona, ROUND(SUM(CAST(devloop_cost_spent_usd AS DOUBLE)), 2) as total_spent FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND devloop_cost_spent_usd IS NOT NULL AND persona_name IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY persona ORDER BY total_spent DESC

panels.title: Budget Utilization Over Time (%)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CAST(devloop_cost_spent_usd AS DOUBLE)) / NULLIF(SUM(CAST(devloop_cost_budget_usd AS DOUBLE)), 0), 1) as utilization_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND devloop_cost_spent_usd IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Cumulative Monthly Spend (USD)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as month, SUM(CAST(devloop_cost_spent_usd AS DOUBLE)) as monthly_total FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND devloop_cost_spent_usd IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '90 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

panels.title: Top Spending Runs
panels.query: SELECT trace_id, ROUND(CAST(devloop_cost_spent_usd AS DOUBLE), 4) as spent_usd FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop' AND devloop_cost_spent_usd IS NOT NULL AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 ORDER BY spent_usd DESC LIMIT 20
